MailCache HTTP utilities [![GoDoc](https://godoc.org/github.com/mailcache/http?status.svg)](https://godoc.org/github.com/mailcache/http) [![Build Status](https://travis-ci.org/mailcache/http.svg?branch=master)](https://travis-ci.org/mailcache/http)
=========

`github.com/mailcache/http` provides HTTP utilities used by MailHog-UI and MailHog-Server.
